utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format includes six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six of these items. Each item is fully specified with the expected details: 

1. property — includes address, type, bedrooms, bathrooms, features, price, currency, neighborhood, and community notes. ✅
2. financing — includes method, down payment, interest rate, term, amortization, and estimated monthly payment. ✅
3. legal_services — includes lawyer cost, survey cost, processing fees, total cost, and currency. ✅
4. moving_services — includes service name, level, cost, currency, and details. ✅
5. setup_services — includes utility package name, type, cost, currency, included utilities, and setup timeline. ✅
6. total_budget — includes property price, total additional costs, grand total, and currency. ✅

All six items are present and fully specified according to the format requirements.
